shared_properties: Core palette #535353/#F7F7F7/#FF0000 duplicated in this file.
Static obstacle rendering with no animated frames.
differences: Bounds expand to 102x100 px for a three-stem cluster.
Center stem rises to 100 px while side stems stay shorter.
Cluster width forces the longest ground-obstacle clearance timing.

reference_images.label: cactus
reference_images.purpose: Ground the cactus obstacle silhouette and cluster width.

reference_images.label: style
reference_images.purpose: Ground the monochrome pixel-art outline and spacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/chrome_dino_runner/trial_4/art_000008.png with AssetServer during Loading state and keep the handle in a resource entry keyed by art_000008.
runtime_notes: Apply nearest-neighbor sampling and integer-pixel transforms at runtime.
Keep the authored 1x pixel ratio and scale only by integer multiples in camera space.
Use a deterministic startup registration order so task execution order maps to asset registration order.
Spawn the sprite as a single-image handle with no runtime atlas index changes.

context.usage: Spawn as the tallest cactus cluster after difficulty ramps and keep the base locked to the ground line.

shape.silhouette: Three-stem cactus cluster with one tall center stem and two shorter side stems.

acceptance_criteria: Visible pixels use only the hex colors listed in specs.colors_hex plus transparency.
Opaque pixels stay inside the authored bounds with no anti-aliased edge pixels.
